东方玉自阳霍归乡，本是富贵公子，不愿像前世那般疯狂工作，只求躺平度日。
一日闲逛看到招兵榜文，凑去一看，竟与壮汉相识，一问竟是张飞张翼德！
正交谈甚欢时，刘备走来，加入聊天群，并成为群主。
未久，关羽也现身。
刘备发出结义申请，东方玉扶汉之心骤起，当即抛弃躺平之心，结为其四弟。
无系统，凭权谋，勤种田，随刘关张争霸天下，共扶汉室！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6c19ecf4de999f15c941267d2a0331ce","author":"罗纳尔豆","author_id":"","book_id":"7599880717438290969","book_name":"三国：开局巧遇刘关张竟成其四弟","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281000","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4411人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7599880800225460761","read_count":"4411","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"205354"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"101","tags":"历史古代,历史,三国,穿越,开局,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7c020462a297a778ecff511fca0a820e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779444942&x-signature=RNUCryRwhPCemqyOUgdq2HQJUms%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2032377718117230","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"22"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318154233DA5A24EE51FC1F919B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读55分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen
